testcase.name: User should be able to login to the application with valid credentails
testcase.system-out: Given the user launches the browser.........................................passed Given the user is on the Amazon login page..................................passed When the user enter valid user name and password............................passed Then the user should be able to login to the application....................passed

testcase.name: User should be able to login to the application with valid credentails
testcase.system-out: Given the user launches the browser.........................................passed Given the user is on the Amazon login page..................................passed When the user enter '"sourav123@gmail.com"' and '"123456"'..................passed Then the user should be able to login to the application....................passed

testcase.name: User should be able to login to the application with valid credentails 2
testcase.system-out: Given the user launches the browser.........................................passed Given the user is on the Amazon login page..................................passed When the user enter '"sourav123456@gmail.com"' and '"3245678"'..............passed Then the user should be able to login to the application....................passed

testcase.name: User should be able to login to the application with valid credentails 3
testcase.system-out: Given the user launches the browser.........................................passed Given the user is on the Amazon login page..................................passed When the user enter '"sourav234@gmail.com"' and '"7865432"'.................passed Then the user should be able to login to the application....................passed
